SummaryOfDirectChrtblActyGrp.Description1Txt: OPERATION OF AN INDEPENDENT AND ASSISTED LIVING CENTER FOR THE LONG TERM CARE, COMFORT AND MAINTENACE FOR THE ELDERLY. THE HOME IS LICENSED FOR 64 BEDS AND IS CERTIFIED FOR 74 BEDS. IN 2013, THE FOUNDATION COMPLETED CONSTRUCTION ON OAK HOUSE, A THREE STORY ADDITION THAT ADDED 22 ASSISTED LIVING AND 11 MEMORY CARE ASSISTED LIVING SUITES.

SumOfProgramRelatedInvstGrp.Description1Txt: CURRENT YEAR ACQUISITION OF HOME CARE SOLUTIONS, LLC (HCS). IN-LINE WITH INDUSTRY TRENDS AROUND THE COUNTRY, THE PURCHASE OF HCS WILL ALLOW THE ORGANIZATION TO EXPAND THEIR REACH TO A NEW POPLUATION IN THE COMMUNITY THAT DESIRES QUALITY CARE FROM THE COMFORT AND CONVENIENCE OF THEIR HOMES.

RlnOfActyToAccomOfExmptPrpsGrp.RelationshipStatementTxt: PROVIDES FOR CARE OF RESIDENTS AT POYDRAS HOME AND HOME BASED CARE
PROVIDES FOR AN ELDERLY DAY CARE PROGRAM AT THE HOME
INCOME FROM THE FACILITY WHERE THE EXEMPT ACTIVITIES OCCUR
PROVIDES FOR EMPLOYEES TO TAKE CARE OF THE RESIDENTS AT THE HOME
PROVIDES MEALS FOR CONVENIENCE OF VISITORS
PROVIDES TRANSPORATION FOR THE RESIDENTS OF THE HOME
PROVIDES VENDING MACHINE ITEMS FOR RESIDENTS AND EMPLOYEES AT THE HOME
MISC INCOME TO CARRY OUT EXEMPT PURPOSE

GeneralExplanationGrp.MediumExplanationTxt: THE POYDRAS HOME OPERATES AN INDEPENDENT AND ASSISTED LIVING CENTER FOR THE LONG TERM CARE, COMFORT AND MAINTENANCE FOR THE ELDERLY. THE HOME IS LICENSED FOR 64 BEDS AND IS CERTIFIED FOR 74 BEDS. IT CONSTRUCTED A NEW FACILITY, WHICH WAS COMPLETED IN 2013, TO PROVIDE ADDITIONAL QUARTERS FOR ASSISTED LIVING AND ADVANCED DEMENTIA CARE. POYDRAS HOME CREATED A SUBORDINATE ORGANIZATION DURING 2012 TO FACILITATE THIS CONSTRUCTION, AND IT IS THE PARENT THAT CONTROLS THIS SUBORDINATE ORGANIZATION. THE SUBORDINATE ORGANIZATION IS:1.)POYDRAS HOME BUILDING, LLC (EIN: 45-4411787)IN 2013, POYDRAS HOME BUILDING, LLC FILED AN APPLICATION TO QUALIFY AS A 501(C)(2) ORGANIZATION, AND AS SUCH, IT FILED A CONSOLIDATED RETURN WITH ITS PARENT ORGANIZATION, POYDRAS HOME. HOWEVER, THE TAX EXEMPT APPLICATION WAS UNABLE TO BE PROCESSED BECAUSE THE LEGAL STRUCTURE OF THE ENTITY COULD NOT BE ALTERED WITHOUT JEOPARDIZING THE NEW MARKET TAX CREDITS. THEREFORE, FOR THE 2016 TAX YEAR, POYDRAS HOME BUILDING, LLC FILED A SEPARATE FORM 1065.
